name: io.github.gupta-kush/spotify-mcp
title: Spotify MCP Server
description: Spotify MCP server with 100+ tools. Smart shuffle, natural language song search, vibe analysis, artist network mapping, taste evolution, playlist diff/merge/dedup. Works after Spotify's Feb 2026 API changes.

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Spotify API client ID from developer.spotify.com/dashboard

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Spotify API client secret (optional, PKCE auth works without it)
